summary: Iteration 44: Comprehensive testing of redesigned Booking Modal, Chat interface, Contact form, and Legal pages. ALL TESTS PASSED (100% backend, 100% frontend). Booking modal has premium B2B design with bk-* CSS classes, progress bar with numbered steps, date cards with day/num/month format. Chat interface verified with avatars, timestamps, and disclaimer. Contact form sends source+language fields. Legal pages have correct section numbering.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all booking, chat, legal, and regression tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Booking modal uses bk-* CSS classes (premium B2B design). Chat has avatars, timestamps, 'KI-Berater' sender label, and disclaimer. Contact form sends source='contact_form' and language='de'. Legal pages have correct 1-6 section numbering. Login page uses magic-link (email-only) with 2-column layout.

CHAT_4_API.details: POST /api/chat/message returns valid response with message, qualification

CONTACT_1_Form.details: Contact form submits with source='contact_form' and language='de', returns lead_id

BOOKING_1_Desktop_Modal.details: Modal opens with header (title, '30 Min. Strategiegespräch', 'Kostenfrei & unverbindlich'), close button, progress indicator with numbered steps

BOOKING_2_Date_Time_Selection.details: Date grid with 10 dates in day/number/month format. Time grid appears after date selection with 11 slots

BOOKING_3_Navigation.details: 'Weiter' button navigates to step 2. Progress bar updates from 50% to 100%

BOOKING_4_Step2_Form.details: Back button works. Selected summary shows date+time. Form has Vorname, Nachname, Email (required), Telefon, Unternehmen, Thema (optional)

BOOKING_5_Validation.details: Form validation shows 3 errors when submitting empty required fields

BOOKING_6_Mobile.details: At 375px: Booking modal full-screen (width ratio 1.00) with adapted layout

CHAT_1_Desktop.details: Chat opens with sidebar (brand, presets, CTAs, New Conversation button) and main area

CHAT_2_Messages.details: Assistant messages have avatar, sender 'KI-Berater', timestamp. User messages on right with sender 'Sie'

CHAT_3_Disclaimer.details: Bottom text 'KI-gestützter Assistent. Keine rechtsverbindlichen Zusagen.'

CHAT_5_Mobile.details: Full-screen with mobile header (back arrow, brand, status dot). body.chat-open class applied

LEGAL_1_Footer_Links.details: All 4 legal pages accessible: Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB, KI-Hinweise

REGRESSION_Landing.details: Landing page loads at 1920px with hero, nav, 3D scene, hero stats

REGRESSION_Login.details: Login page /login works with 2-column layout (branding left, magic-link form right)
